query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_articles, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%24-7pressrelease%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_pressrelease_links,
       SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' OR content LIKE '%tkqlhce.com%' OR content LIKE '%dpbolvw.net%' OR content LIKE '%kqzyfj.com%' OR content LIKE '%jdoqocy.com%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cj_links
FROM articles WHERE status = 'published';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mexMZK3NDs3KsAz.c9d58c93f039 --database RymVrvaM7i66nf7Xs2w9Hu --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_articles, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%24-7pressrelease%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_pressrelease_links,
       SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' OR content LIKE '%tkqlhce.com%' OR content LIKE '%dpbolvw.net%' OR content LIKE '%kqzyfj.com%' OR content LIKE '%jdoqocy.com%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cj_links
FROM articles WHERE status = 'published';
